name: Subway Surfers
description: Dash through the subway and dodge the oncoming trains! Run, jump, and slide your way to high scores.

name: Temple Run 2
description: Navigate perilous cliffs and zip lines as you escape the cursed temple.

name: Moto X3M
description: Race your motorcycle through insane obstacle courses. Perform flips and stunts to beat the clock!

name: Moto X3M Spooky Land
description: The spooky edition of Moto X3M! Ride through haunted tracks on your motorcycle.

name: Stickman Hook
description: Swing from hook to hook like a spider-man! Simple controls, addictive gameplay.

name: Candy Match
description: Match colorful candies to create combos and clear the board. Sweet puzzle fun!

name: Basketball Stars
description: Hit the court and shoot some hoops in this exciting basketball game!

name: Soccer Random
description: A fun and random soccer game with changing fields and players. Score to win!

name: Slope
description: Roll down the slope at high speed! Avoid obstacles and don't fall off the edge.

name: Geometry Dash
description: Rhythm-based platforming! Jump and fly through dangerous passages and spiky obstacles.

name: 1v1.LOL
description: Build defenses and battle opponents in this 1v1 shooting game!

name: Slither.io
description: Eat orbs to grow longer and become the biggest snake in the arena!

name: Agar.io
description: Eat smaller cells and avoid being eaten. Can you become the biggest cell?

name: Among Us Online
description: Find the impostor! Work together to complete tasks on the spaceship.

name: Minecraft Classic
description: Build and explore in this classic block-building game. Place and break blocks freely!

name: Happy Wheels
description: Ragdoll physics madness! Race through obstacle courses with various characters.

name: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to fly through the pipes! Simple but insanely addictive.
Slide numbered tiles to combine them and reach the 2048 tile!

name: Tetris
description: The classic block-stacking puzzle game! Rotate and place tetrominos to clear lines.

name: Crossy Road
description: Why did the chicken cross the road? Find out in this endless arcade hopper!

name: Fruit Ninja
description: Slice fruits in half with your finger! Don't let them fall, and avoid bombs.

name: Cut the Rope
description: Feed candy to Om Nom! Cut ropes strategically to collect stars and complete levels.

name: Angry Birds
description: Launch birds at pig structures to destroy them! Use physics to your advantage.

name: Doodle Jump
description: Jump from platform to platform and climb as high as you can! Avoid aliens and monsters.

name: Run 3
description: Run through space tunnels and defy gravity! Don't fall into the void.

name: Bubble Shooter
description: Match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to pop them! Clear the board to win.

name: 8 Ball Pool
description: The classic pool game! Aim, shoot, and sink all your balls before your opponent.

name: Table Tennis Pro
description: Fast-paced ping pong action! Serve, smash, and outplay your opponent.

name: Hill Climb Racing
description: Drive your vehicle through hilly terrains! Upgrade your car and reach the finish.

name: Traffic Racer
description: Drive fast on the highway and overtake other cars! Endless racing fun.

name: Paper.io
description: Claim as much territory as possible! Draw lines to capture ground and eliminate opponents.

name: Diep.io
description: Upgrade your tank and destroy shapes and other players! Shape-based .io shooter.

name: Krunker.io
description: Fast-paced pixel FPS! Jump, slide, and shoot your way to the top of the leaderboard.

name: Shellshockers
description: Egg-citing FPS! Play as an egg armed with weapons in this cracking multiplayer shooter.

name: Zombs Royale.io
description: 2D battle royale! Drop in, loot weapons, and be the last survivor standing.

name: Skribbl.io
description: Draw and guess words in this multiplayer drawing game! Create private rooms with friends.

name: Gartic.io
description: Draw and guess words with players from around the world! Fun multiplayer drawing game.

name: Mope.io
description: Evolve from a mouse to an elephant or dragon! Eat food and climb the food chain.

name: Wormate.io
description: Eat food and grow your worm! Sweet power-ups and cute graphics.

name: Tank Trouble
description: Drive a tank through a maze and destroy enemy tanks! Single and multiplayer fun.

name: Super Smash Flash 2
description: The ultimate Smash Bros fan game! Battle with iconic characters across stages.

name: Fall Guys
description: Compete in wacky obstacle courses! Be the last bean standing in this battle royale.

name: Stumble Guys
description: Knockdown royale! Run through obstacle courses and be the last guy standing.

name: Bad Ice-Cream
description: Control an ice cream character and freeze enemies! Collect all the fruit in each level.

name: Violot Race
description: High-speed racing with cool cars and challenging tracks!

name: Rocket Soccer Derby
description: Drive rocket-powered cars and score epic goals in this soccer derby!

name: Real Basketball
description: Realistic basketball simulation! Shoot hoops and improve your skills.

name: Desktop Golf
description: Relaxing mini-golf right on your desktop! Simple controls, challenging holes.

name: Sudoku Puzzle
description: The classic number placement puzzle! Fill the grid with digits 1-9.

name: Solitaire
description: The classic card game! Arrange cards in descending order alternating colors.

name: Word Search
description: Find hidden words in a grid of letters! Multiple categories and difficulty levels.

name: Bejeweled Clasic
description: The original match-3 gem game! Swap gems to make matches and score points.

name: Farm Heroes Saga
description: Match crops to complete farm-tastic puzzles! From the makers of Candy Crush.

name: Candy Crush Saga
description: Match 3 candies in this sweet puzzle adventure! Thousands of levels to explore.

name: Clash of Clans
description: Build your village, train troops, and battle other players! Strategic base building.

name: Clash Royale
description: Real-time strategy card battling! Deploy troops and destroy enemy towers.

name: Lordz.io
description: Build your medieval empire! Collect gold, build castles, and command armies.

name: Roblox
description: Create and play in immersive 3D worlds! Explore user-generated games and experiences.

name: Plants vs Zombies
description: Defend your garden from zombies with an army of plants! Strategic tower defense fun.
